title: coffea eugenioides var. kivuensis
intro: Coffea eugenioides var. kivuensis is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to the Democratic Republic of Congo. It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Coffea eugenioides var. kivuensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its leaves in water, with the herbal preparation being consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
